overall.description: First-person gameplay footage depicting a nighttime walk through a rural village with traditional wooden architecture. The player moves along a dirt path between wooden cabins, encounters a dog walking alongside, and approaches a fenced area while wielding a wooden club.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow dirt path between traditional wooden village houses

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path between wooden cabins in a dark village at night

entered.detail: traditional wooden house with dark timber walls and pitched roof
wooden structure with weathered planks and overhanging roof
unpaved trail with loose gravel and dirt surface
horizontal wooden plank fence running alongside the path
tall green grass and shrubbery growing alongside the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a first-person view walking through a narrow dirt path in a rural village at night. Traditional wooden cabins line both sides of the trail, with a wooden fence visible on the left and grass bushes on the right. The scene is dimly lit with clear night skies visible above.

scene_state.functional_zone: village path with approaching picket fence

events.description: a dark-colored dog enters from the right side and walks alongside the path

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward as a dog passes by on the right side of the path

notable_agents.action: dog walking in the same direction alongside the path, keeping pace with the camera

entered.detail: vertical wooden picket fence with pointed tops marking a property boundary

segments.scene_description: As the camera progresses along the path, a dog appears on the right and walks alongside briefly. The wooden fence on the left falls behind while a picket fence becomes visible ahead on the right. The wooden cabins on both sides draw closer as the camera advances.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching wooden gate and picket fence

events.description: player character raises a wooden club into the lower left of the frame

agents.ego_description: approaching a wooden fence while holding a wooden club in the left hand, preparing to interact with the gate

entered.detail: wooden gate structure with vertical posts and horizontal beams

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera approaching a wooden picket fence and gate on the right side after the dog has exited the scene. The left-side cabin falls behind as the path continues. At approximately 11 seconds, the player's hand holding a wooden club enters the frame from the left as they near the fence structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dimly lit rural village at night, moving from an open dirt path toward a gated enclosure. It begins by navigating a narrow trail lined with traditional wooden cabins, with a wooden fence on the left and grass bushes on the right under a clear night sky. As the camera progresses, a dog appears and walks alongside on the right while the initial fence recedes and the surrounding cabins draw closer. The scene then shifts as the dog exits the frame and the path leads toward a wooden picket fence and gate. Finally, the camera approaches the gate structure as a hand wielding a wooden club enters the frame from the left.
